heading: I. GLOBAL LIGHTING
text: Flat or simple gradient lighting suitable for 2D parallax side-scrollers. Avoid heavy realistic volumetric shadows.

heading: II. BACKGROUND RULES
text: All generated isolated objects (Characters, Items, Obstacles, UI) MUST be generated with a perfectly transparent background. You must explicitly include the requirement for "transparent background" in your generation prompt.

heading: III. DIMENSION RULES
text:
- **Icons**: Must occupy exactly 80% of the canvas framing, perfectly centered
- **Characters**: Full body visibility, drawn strictly from a side-view profile (facing right). Must visibly integrate a forward-facing weapon to support the core shoot-to-fly mechanic.
- **Obstacles**: Designed as modular, tileable blocks that stack vertically into pillars. Materials must distinctly communicate physical properties (e.g., glass for fragile, metal/plating for armored/indestructible).

heading: IV. PERSPECTIVE RULES
text: Strictly 2D side-profile (orthographic projection). Absolutely no 3D depth, isometric angles, or top-down perspective.

heading: VI. UI RULES
text: - **Overlays**: UI elements and popups must be designed as clean, lightweight overlays (semi-transparent backgrounds) to support zero-friction gameplay navigation without full screen reloads.
